assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id":"openscap_019",
  "rule_id": "Ensure PAM Enforces Password Requirements - Minimum Special Characters",
  "category": "safe_to_remediate",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "rationale": "Standard password complexity requirement that can be safely applied without risking lockout when implemented correctly.",
  "risk_factors": [
    "misconfigured PAM password policy"
  ],
  "safe_next_steps": [
    "Edit /etc/security/pwquality.conf and set ocredit to required value (e.g., -1 or 1)",
    "Validate configuration syntax",
    "Apply changes and test with a new user session",
    "Verify password policy enforcement with pam_pwquality test"
  ],
  "requires_reboot": false,
  "touches_authn_authz": true,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": false
}
